headline: Another Monday Madness: A Tech Take
summary: U.S.-Israel war on Iran persists, in spite of Trump's signals of potential resolution to which the market has grown thicker-skinned. Read full analysis here.

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.
